title.en: Fluid, natural voice translation with Gemini 3.5 Live Translate
title.th: Fluid, natural voice translation with Gemini 3.5 Live Translate

summary.en: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate brings near real-time, natural speech translation to Google AI Studio, Google Translate and Google Meet.
summary.th: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate brings near real-time, natural speech translation to Google AI Studio, Google Translate and Google Meet.

text.th: Innovation & AI

text.en: Models & research

text.en: Gemini Models
text.th: Gemini Models

text.en: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate is our latest audio model, delivering near real-time speech-to-speech translation in over 70 languages.
text.th: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate is our latest audio model, delivering near real-time speech-to-speech translation in over 70 languages.

body.alt: Sparkle next to text "Gemini 3.5 Live Translate"

text.en: Your browser does not support the audio element.
text.th: Your browser does not support the audio element.

text.en: Twenty years ago, translation at Google began as one of our pioneering machine learning experiments to turn the science of language into the magic of human connection. That experiment has come a long way with over a trillion words being translated for billions of users across our products every month.
text.th: Twenty years ago, translation at Google began as one of our pioneering machine learning experiments to turn the science of language into the magic of human connection. That experiment has come a long way with over a trillion words being translated for billions of users across our products every month.

text.en: Today, we’re taking our next step with the release of Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, our latest audio model for live speech-to-speech translation.
text.th: Today, we’re taking our next step with the release of Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, our latest audio model for live speech-to-speech translation.

text.en: The model automatically detects 70+ languages and generates smooth, natural-sounding translated speech that preserves the speakers' intonation, pacing and pitch. Unlike turn by turn systems that wait for the speaker to finish speaking before responding, 3.5 Live Translate generates speech continuously, balancing the trade-off between waiting for context to improve quality and translating immediately to stay in sync with the speaker. It delivers fluid audio without awkward pauses and stays just a few seconds behind the speaker throughout the session.
text.th: The model automatically detects 70+ languages and generates smooth, natural-sounding translated speech that preserves the speakers' intonation, pacing and pitch. Unlike turn by turn systems that wait for the speaker to finish speaking before responding, 3.5 Live Translate generates speech continuously, balancing the trade-off between waiting for context to improve quality and translating immediately to stay in sync with the speaker. It delivers fluid audio without awkward pauses and stays just a few seconds behind the speaker throughout the session.

text.en: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate is rolling out starting today across Google products:
text.th: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate is rolling out starting today across Google products:

text.en: For developers in public preview via the Gemini Live API and Google AI Studio
text.th: For developers in public preview via the Gemini Live API and Google AI Studio

text.en: For enterprises in private preview starting this month in Google Meet
text.th: For enterprises in private preview starting this month in Google Meet

text.en: For everyone via Google Translate on Android and iOS
text.th: For everyone via Google Translate on Android and iOS

text.en: Build with 3.5 Live Translate
text.th: Build with 3.5 Live Translate

text.en: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate processes speech as it’s streamed, enabling a more seamless connection across languages. The model handles multilingual inputs without the need to manually configure settings. At the same time, its noise robustness ensures applications can handle loud, unpredictable environments. You can use its capabilities to help facilitate live interpretation for multilingual calls, meetings, lessons, broadcasts and more.
text.th: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate processes speech as it’s streamed, enabling a more seamless connection across languages. The model handles multilingual inputs without the need to manually configure settings. At the same time, its noise robustness ensures applications can handle loud, unpredictable environments. You can use its capabilities to help facilitate live interpretation for multilingual calls, meetings, lessons, broadcasts and more.

text.en: Watch the Gemini Live API in action, enabling dubbing and simultaneous multi-language translation. Dive into the demo or more example code in the Gemini Cookbook.
text.th: Watch the Gemini Live API in action, enabling dubbing and simultaneous multi-language translation. Dive into the demo or more example code in the Gemini Cookbook.

text.en: By utilizing the Gemini Live API, developer platforms like Agora, Fishjam, LiveKit, Pipecat, and Vision Agents enable developers to build and deploy voice translation apps with ease. These integrations handle the complex real-time media streaming infrastructure, so developers can focus on the user experience.
text.th: By utilizing the Gemini Live API, developer platforms like Agora, Fishjam, LiveKit, Pipecat, and Vision Agents enable developers to build and deploy voice translation apps with ease. These integrations handle the complex real-time media streaming infrastructure, so developers can focus on the user experience.

text.en: Our partners at Grab are testing the model to enable multilingual communication in near real-time between drivers and travelers at pickups. These users make over 10 million voice calls per month through Grab.
text.th: Our partners at Grab are testing the model to enable multilingual communication in near real-time between drivers and travelers at pickups. These users make over 10 million voice calls per month through Grab.

text.th: Read the early reviews

text.en: Experience 3.5 Live Translate in your video meetings
text.th: Experience 3.5 Live Translate in your video meetings

text.en: Speech translation in Google Meet will soon use 3.5 Live Translate, improving the experience by:
text.th: Speech translation in Google Meet will soon use 3.5 Live Translate, improving the experience by:

text.en: Offering 70+ languages, an improvement from the previous limit of just five languages,
text.th: Offering 70+ languages, an improvement from the previous limit of just five languages,

text.en: Enabling conversations across over 2000+ language combinations in one meeting, expanding from the previous state of only translating to and from English,
text.th: Enabling conversations across over 2000+ language combinations in one meeting, expanding from the previous state of only translating to and from English,

text.en: Updating the interface to provide instant access to speech translation.
text.th: Updating the interface to provide instant access to speech translation.

text.en: We’re launching this update in private preview for select business Google Workspace customers starting this month, followed by a broader rollout later this year.
text.th: We’re launching this update in private preview for select business Google Workspace customers starting this month, followed by a broader rollout later this year.

text.en: Get 3.5 Live Translate in the Google Translate app on Android or iOS
text.th: Get 3.5 Live Translate in the Google Translate app on Android or iOS

text.en: The model is also rolling out on the Google Translate app globally, on both Android and iOS. When using the Live translate feature, simply connect any pair of headphones to experience a more seamless translation that mirrors the speaker’s tone across 70+ languages.
text.th: The model is also rolling out on the Google Translate app globally, on both Android and iOS. When using the Live translate feature, simply connect any pair of headphones to experience a more seamless translation that mirrors the speaker’s tone across 70+ languages.

text.en: For Android users, we’re also starting to roll out a new ‘listening mode’ with 3.5 Live Translate that lets you hear translations directly through your phone’s earpiece. Simply hold your phone to your ear just like a regular call, and the translated audio streams straight to you. This new experience can be helpful in situations where you want to quickly hear translations without others hearing, and you don’t have your headphones handy.
text.th: For Android users, we’re also starting to roll out a new ‘listening mode’ with 3.5 Live Translate that lets you hear translations directly through your phone’s earpiece. Simply hold your phone to your ear just like a regular call, and the translated audio streams straight to you. This new experience can be helpful in situations where you want to quickly hear translations without others hearing, and you don’t have your headphones handy.

text.en: Using the new listening mode, users can hear a near real-time English translation of a guided tour in Spanish directly through their phone's earpiece.
text.th: Using the new listening mode, users can hear a near real-time English translation of a guided tour in Spanish directly through their phone's earpiece.

text.en: Watermarked with SynthID
text.th: Watermarked with SynthID

text.en: All audio generated by our models is watermarked with SynthID. This imperceptible watermark is woven directly into the audio output, ensuring AI-generated content remains detectable to help prevent misinformation. For details on our approach to safety and responsibility, review the model card.
